positive: A stylized minimalist representation of a mystical forest creature, resembling a blend of fox, deer, and celestial energy. The creature is positioned centrally, viewed in a confident, alert pose, with clean, flowing silhouettes. It is surrounded by highly stylized, bioluminescent flora and abstract geometric forest elements. Use a palette of deep indigo, emerald green, gold accents, and deep teal. The style should be a modern, illustrative vector art mixed with ethereal watercolor elements. High contrast, strong outlines, perfect for a t-shirt print. Studio lighting, clean background, intricate details, vector illustration, symmetrical, concept art.
negative: blur, grainy, noisy, low detail, artifact, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, asymmetrical, photo, hyperrealistic, deep shadows
